report.summary: Stable cycle — no new commits or deploys, all 6 API routes healthy with correct cache headers, 2 persistent TS errors and missing defi-yields fallback remain as known carry-overs, Vercel trial expires in ~8 days.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 400 slugs in published-pages.ts (up 1 from prior cycle), 296 have page.tsx files, 104 remain backlog placeholders — no regressions, 1 new page confirmed present

TypeScript errors persist in 2 files: src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX/template syntax — 42 errors) and src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts
No new commits in this cycle window — zero regressions introduced, last git commit was cb65a9d (Day 42 publish, 23h+ ago)
Local build still OOM in VM environment as expected — Vercel cloud builds remain stable at ~4min

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes confirmed present and structured: /api/prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), /api/trending (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), /api/fear-greed (Alternative.me, 10min TTL), /api/market-dominance (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), /api/market-metrics (CoinGecko + Alternative.me, 60s TTL), /api/defi-yields (DefiLlama, 5min TTL)
Cache headers verified on defi-yields: s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate in place — data freshness ladder intact across all routes
KNOWN ISSUE: /api/defi-yields returns HTTP 500 on upstream failure with no fallback data — error catch block confirmed at line 114 of route.ts
Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes have rate limiting applied — abuse risk remains open, especially on /api/prices
No rate limit hits or stale data incidents detected this cycle

sections.title: DevOps & Deployment
items: Latest Vercel production build: deployment 8669UtKE9 — Status: Ready, build time 4m 23s, healthy
No new deployments this cycle — last git-triggered deploy from cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) remains live
Deployment cadence steady: 15+ successful redeploys today, zero failures in recent chain
ALERT: Vercel Pro trial expiring in approximately 8 days — Jefe must add payment method at vercel.com/account/billing before March 25 to prevent service interruption
Vercel platform status: All systems operational

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing new — idle cycle, no commits or deploys since last checkpoint

Carry-over (unchanged): Fix TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts and crypto-index-funds-guide page, add fallback data to /api/defi-yields, add rate limiting to at least /api/prices and /api/trending, continue page.tsx scaffold for 104 backlog slugs
BLOCKER for Jefe: Vercel trial billing — add payment method before March 25 to avoid production downtime
